desc: Fix the one-line bug deep in the `padRight` helper inside the large file src/wrap.ts. Its while-loop condition uses `<=` instead of `<`, so it appends one space too many and over-pads strings by a single character. Edit only that line/function so tests/wrap.test.ts passes. Do not rewrite the whole file; src/casing.ts and src/table.ts already pass.
